reviews.comment:
4 surtidores 2 playeros , con 0 ganas de atender. Hace 10' q estoy esperando al lado del surtidor, q el playero termine de limpiar el vidrio de una camioneta. No sería mejor q atienda de a 2 surtidores y q si le sobra tiempo limpie vidrios

(Translated by Google)
Four pumps, two attendants, and they're completely unwilling to help. I've been waiting next to the pump for 10 minutes while the attendant finishes cleaning a truck windshield. Wouldn't it be better if he worked two pumps at a time and cleaned windshields if he had any time left over?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNvaGF5QTBBRRAB
